concept: ** This casual endless runner challenges players to escape pursuing police cars by drawing the road ahead of their vehicle. Using simple tap and drag controls, players continuously create a path, aiming to outmaneuver the cops and avoid crashing. The game's core loop involves achieving the highest possible score by surviving longer as the speed and intensity of the chase increase. Progression is centered on leaderboard competition, with players striving to beat their friends' high scores in this perpetually scrolling environment. While 100% free to play, a VIP MEMBERSHIP subscription, priced at $7.99 USD weekly, offers exclusive benefits like ad removal and potentially in-game currency bonuses or unique vehicle skins.
name: Highway Heat
